properties.name: src
properties.label: Src
properties.valueHandler: const selectedComponent = Utils.first(Vars.selectedComponents); if(selectedComponent.input?.src?.type=='value'){ return selectedComponent.input?.src?.value??''; } return '';
properties.stateHandler: const selectedComponent = Utils.first(Vars.selectedComponents); let state = 'unabled'; if(selectedComponent.input?.src?.type =='handler'&&selectedComponent.input?.src?.value){ state = 'disabled' } return state;

eventHandlers.valueChange: const selectedComponent = Utils.first(Vars.selectedComponents); const newSrcText = EventData.value; updateInput(selectedComponent,'src','string',newSrcText);

properties.name: previewable
properties.label: Previewable
properties.stateHandler: const selectedComponent = Utils.first(Vars.selectedComponents); let state = 'unabled'; if(selectedComponent.input?.previewable?.type =='handler'&&selectedComponent.input?.previewable?.value){ state = 'disabled' } return state;

eventHandlers.valueChange: const selectedComponent = Utils.first(Vars.selectedComponents); const newAltText = EventData.value; updateInput(selectedComponent,'previewable','string',newAltText);
